openpgp_packet_header_t(3) Library Functions Manual openpgp_packet_header_t(3)

NAME

openpgp_packet_header_t - OpenPGP packet header information.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/crypto/gpg/openpgp.h>

Data Fields


uint8_t tag
Packet tag (type identifier). size_t length
Packet body length. size_t header_len
Header length (bytes consumed by header). bool new_format
True if new format, false if old format.

Detailed Description

OpenPGP packet header information.

Represents the parsed header of an OpenPGP packet, including tag, length, and offset information.

Definition at line 71 of file openpgp.h.

Field Documentation

size_t openpgp_packet_header_t::header_len

Header length (bytes consumed by header).

Definition at line 74 of file openpgp.h.

True if new format, false if old format.

Definition at line 75 of file openpgp.h.

Referenced by openpgp_parse_packet_header().
